# oksigenia-farmkit

> Modular farming-game engine for Flutter / Flame. Open source. Part of the Granja Óga ecosystem.
> Last updated: 2026-05-13

## What this is

`oksigenia-farmkit` is a Dart/Flutter package that provides the core
engine for a farming-simulation mini-game: turn-based loop,
weather-driven crop yield, quality-driven economy, soil degradation
and crop rotation, pest pressure, per-turn action budget, narrative
event system, seasonal dynamic pricing with weather shock.

It is **engine-only** — no widgets, no sprites, no opinions about
rendering. Host apps decide how to display the state.

- Repository: https://github.com/OksigeniaSL/oksigenia-farmkit
- License: BSD-3-Clause
- Current version: 0.7.0-beta.2
- Live demo: https://oksigeniasl.github.io/oksigenia-farmkit/
- Built with: Dart / Flutter
- Consumed by: Granja Óga mobile app (Flutter) and others

## Key APIs

- `Farm` — top-level facade. `advanceTurn()`, `plant()`, `harvest()`,
  `treat()`, `drainEvents()`.
- `Field` — single plot. Has soil type, fertility, pest pressure,
  crop family streak, current crop and growth stage.
- `Crop` — crop archetype (id, displayName, family, soils, prices,
  pest susceptibility).
- `CropFamily` — taxonomy (nightshade, brassica, legume, root, leafy,
  grass, other) for rotation mechanics.
- `WeatherProvider` — interface; `MockWeatherProvider` and
  `ClimatePreset` (temperate/tropical/etc) bundled.
- `EconomyProvider` — interface; `SeasonalDynamicPricing` bundled
  with hemisphere-aware seasons and weather shock multipliers.
- `FarmEvent` / `FarmEventKind` — narrative events surfaced via
  `drainEvents()` (mono-culture warnings, fertility critical,
  perfect quality, harvest milestones, pest outbreak/cleared,
  rotation streaks, nitrogen fixer harvested).
- `OutOfActionsError` — thrown when per-turn budget is exhausted.

## Status / roadmap

Public API is not yet stable (pre-1.0). Breaking changes can land
in any minor release. Roadmap board:
https://github.com/orgs/OksigeniaSL/projects/3

## How to integrate

```yaml
dependencies:
  oksigenia_farmkit: ^0.7.0-beta.2
```

```dart
import 'package:oksigenia_farmkit/oksigenia_farmkit.dart';

final farm = Farm(
  fields: [Field(id: 'north', size: 1, soil: SoilType.loam)],
  weather: MockWeatherProvider(),
  economy: const SeasonalDynamicPricing(),
  actionsPerTurn: 3,
);
```

## About Granja Óga

Granja Óga is the family initiative behind this kit, based in
Paraguay (Cordillera department). The farmkit was extracted from
the in-house "Mi chacra" mini-game in the Granja Óga mobile app and
released as standalone open source.

- Granja Óga main site: https://granjaoga.com
- Weather dashboard: https://clima.granjaoga.com
- Telegram bot: https://t.me/GranjaOgaBot

## Crawler policy

Allowed bots: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended,
Applebot-Extended, Bingbot, CCBot, Amazonbot. FOSS philosophy:
information should circulate freely.

## How this file is maintained

Manual revision on each substantive change. The `Last updated`
header reflects the most recent revision. Crawlers with browsing
can compare against their cache to detect changes.
